description: PRISM plugin signing key registry. Keys are DER-encoded Ed25519 public keys in base64 format.
_note: Replace publicKeyBase64 with actual PRISM release signing key before production. Generate with: node -e "const c=require('crypto');const {publicKey}=c.generateKeyPairSync('ed25519');console.log(publicKey.export({type:'spki',format:'der'}).toString('base64'))"
